_comment: Family code -> readable label for the UI. Derived from the catalog family names.
ALP: AD Lockout from Stale Cached Mobile Credentials
CES: Internal Web Service Load-Balancer TLS Certificate Expiry
DCP: Intune Device Non-Compliant Encryption (Conditional Access Block)
EDE: BitLocker Not Enabled / Recovery Key Not Escrowed
OES: Outlook / Exchange Online Mailbox Sync Failures
PDQ: Print Server Stuck Jobs / Driver Failure
SML: SSO / MFA Prompt Loop (Okta / Azure AD)
